# ai-first-scraper-mcp

> MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that exposes ad-free web scraping and search as three tools for Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline / any MCP-compatible agent.

## Install for an AI agent (Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "ai-first-scraper": {
      "command": "uvx",
      "args": ["ai-first-scraper-mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

After restart, three tools become available:

| Tool | Args | Returns |
|------|------|---------|
| `fetch_page` | `url: str, max_tokens?: int` | Clean Markdown body (HTML or PDF). |
| `fetch_pages_batch` | `urls: list[str] (≤25), max_tokens?: int` | Per-URL `{url, ok, data?, error?}` objects. |
| `search_web` | `q: str, k: int = 5, max_tokens?: int` | Top-k result pages already converted to Markdown. |

## Config (optional)
Point at your own backend with env vars:
- `SCRAPER_URL` (default `https://ai-first-scraper.onrender.com`)
- `SEARCH_URL` (default `https://ai-first-search.onrender.com`)

## Related
- https://github.com/yubinkim444/ai-first-scraper — backing scraper API.
- https://github.com/yubinkim444/ai-first-search — backing search API.
- https://github.com/yubinkim444/mcp-rec — record & replay this server's traffic for tests.
